use_cases: Users search for available flights by entering origin, destination, and travel dates
Travel booking platforms display flight search interfaces for users to plan trips
Airline websites provide search forms for customers to find and book flights
ai_summary: A flight search card component for searching and booking flights. Features form inputs for origin, destination, dates, and passenger selection with a prominent search action button. Designed as a composite interface for travel and e-commerce platforms, optimized for both desktop and mobile experiences with a clean, modern flat visual style.
